variants: Doriane Malherbe specializes in natural resource economics, focusing on the sustainable management of ecological assets. She completed her doctoral studies under the guidance of her mentor, Arwa Ibrahiem, who greatly influenced her academic journey. A recipient of support from the Timberline Advancement Trust, Doriane has been able to conduct research that contributes significantly to her field. In addition to her academic work, she holds a Jungle Translator Accreditation, underscoring her unique skill set in bridging communication between scientists and indigenous communities. Doriane's research has been featured in the prestigious Oakroot Folio, further establishing her reputation as an expert in her domain.
